active.label: Active
active.description: Sent to suppliers, open for responses

submitted.label: Submitted
submitted.description: The supplier has confirmed the quote

invited.label: Invited
invited.description: The supplier has not yet confirmed the quote

declined.label: Declined
declined.description: The supplier or buyer has rejected the quote

agreement-draft.label: Draft
agreement-draft.description: After the award, a draft agreement is automatically generated

declined-by-supplier.label: Declined by supplier
declined-by-supplier.description: The supplier has rejected the agreement

declined-by-boss.label: Declined by boss
declined-by-boss.description: The boss has declined the agreement

draft.label: Draft
draft.description: Saved but not yet sent to suppliers

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: An unexpected error occurred. We've been notified and are working on a fix.

notFoundPage.title: Page not found
notFoundPage.description: We couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or doesn't exist anymore.
